name: NENE777 Cordless Cyclone Vacuum (3-Stage Suction)
pros: Exceptional value at ¥11,980—one of Japan's cheapest cordless vacuums
3-year battery warranty provides peace of mind for long-term ownership
3-stage adjustable suction and LED display offer decent customization
cons: Build quality feels lightweight and plasticky compared to premium brands
No English manual; setup and filter maintenance require Japanese fluency or translation
shortDescription: Ultra-affordable cordless vacuum with 3-stage suction and 3-year warranty.
review: NENE777 delivers impressive bang-for-buck in Japan's budget vacuum segment, with over 2,800 positive reviews affirming reliability. The 3-year battery warranty is rare at this price. However, expect a lighter feel and slower performance versus Shark or Dyson—best suited for small apartments and light daily cleaning rather than heavy-duty use.
